title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Coby, Unknown person #3 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're a boy! Stop crying so much!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you ever come back here! Under- stood?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The seas are vast.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Some- day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I promise you'll find nice people!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you were right. Out on the vast sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Finally met them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Jodie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This was fate! I became a cook...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...so that one day I'd meet lovely ladies like you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, Sanji, you flirt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What a smooth talker.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But don't tease us so much, okay?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tease?! I'd never! I'm deadly serious. Please, just for today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wish, Lin.,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "UK" Lush" -

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Allow me to be your knight!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You there. Boy. You're quite good with basic sword strikes.

dialogue.speaker: Coby
dialogue.text: Have you been trained in the sword?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huh?! no, no.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just, uh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Are you slacking off again, squirt?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: RUMBL

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Back to work, you louts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: oof..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Move, move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Is Table Four's Soup Not Ready Yet?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sanji! Where'd you get off to, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Peel these! You've got five minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And why ain't the pans washed yet, ya slug?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hey! I'm not your servant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Do it your- self, thug twins!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What, you got a problem, aunt?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ROOKIES DO THE CRUMMY CHORES! That's how it works!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
